title: Anycast & Geo-DNS Strategies
description: Implement Anycast routing principles for distributing global traffic. Architect Geo-DNS strategies to route users to the nearest edge locations. Evaluate the efficacy of BGP Anycast and latency-based steering in global load balancing.
objectives: Implement Anycast routing principles for distributing global traffic.
Architect Geo-DNS strategies to route users to the nearest edge locations.
Evaluate the efficacy of BGP Anycast and latency-based steering in global load balancing.
